name: daftari
description: A persistent knowledge vault for AI agents. Agents read, write, and curate markdown documents that compound over time.
long_description: Daftari is an MCP server that exposes a curated markdown vault to AI agents. The vault is plain text on disk (markdown with YAML frontmatter, versioned in git) and indexed for hybrid BM25 + vector search. Agents can read, search, write, promote drafts to canonical knowledge, log tensions between documents, and lint the vault for staleness. RBAC is config-driven via .daftari/config.yaml. The default embedding provider runs fully offline on local CPU; an optional OpenAI provider can be enabled in the vault's config.yaml (embeddings.provider: openai-3-small), which requires the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.

vault_path.title: Vault path
vault_path.description: Absolute path to the daftari vault directory.

user.title: User
user.description: Your identity for provenance tracking (e.g. 'mihir'). Recorded on every write.

role.title: Role
role.description: Your role as defined in .daftari/config.yaml (e.g. 'admin', 'analyst'). Determines read/write permissions per collection.

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API key (optional)
openai_api_key.description: OpenAI API key. Required only if the vault's embeddings.provider is set to openai-3-small. Used solely for embedding generation; leave blank for the default local provider.
